name: Joe Biden
subject: Hillary is a force of nature
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
I've known Hillary a long time. | Hi -- I’m excited to be writing to you today. We’re just one day out from the final fundraising deadline of this primary, and after a long, tough fight, we have a presumptive nominee who’s going to be a terrific president: my friend, Hillary.

I’m proud to endorse Hillary, and I’m grateful you’re part of her team -- our whole country is counting on you to make sure she wins this November. President Obama and I are going to be hitting the campaign trail hard to help out as much as we can -- and we hope you’ll join us.

**[With a big deadline like the one the campaign is facing tomorrow and a 250,000 donation goal to hit, every contribution helps -- can you chip in right now to claim your free Team Hillary sticker?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjU4NzA0NjcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODI0NTQ4ODc5S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

I’ve known Hillary for a long time -- from the time she was First Lady, Senator from New York, and our Secretary of State. She is a force of nature. She’s tough, she’s brilliant, and she genuinely loves serving this country. Hillary is the kind of person who, at the end of the day, wants to help people and make their lives better. That’s who you want as your president.

That’s especially true when your other option is Donald Trump.

Donald Trump's politics of fear and intolerance have no place in America. He won't solve our problems -- he'll make them worse. Because let me tell you denigrating our allies isn't a foreign policy. Telling the world the United States can't be counted on to pay our debts isn't an economic policy. And attacking the ethnicity of a federal judge violates everything we stand for -- and believe -- as Americans.

I've always believed this nation succeeds best when we come together as one America. But everything about Donald Trump's campaign is determined to divide and pull us apart.

There’s no one I trust more than Hillary to lead the fight against Trump, and I’m hoping you’ll come through as part of her team again and again. She needs you. We all do.

**I hope you’ll chip in before tomorrow's critical deadline -- I can’t thank you enough for being part of the fight to keep our country moving forward:**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU4NzA0NjcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODI0NTQ4ODc5S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Joe

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than 1.3 million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU4NzA0NjcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODI0NTQ4ODc5S0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.3 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---

name: Ben Carson
subject: Did you know about Christians and Brexit?
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/36187280:sZ593WY-N:m:1:876315805:09C516FAB679C68390B648BA68F6BBF0:r)
---
* * *

Peter,

The people were tired of having their values trampled upon, and wanted real change. The pundits and elites didn't see it coming and bet against them, but the people surprised them.

Sound familiar? In a nutshell, that's what happened when the British people voted to leave the European Union.

The margin of victory for Leave, 52-48 percent, wasn't huge. It could have gone either way.

**Clearly the British people were very divided, but do you know who was much more united than the rest of the population and voted overwhelmingly to leave? It was Christians.**

And now, Great Britain is on a fundamentally different path moving forward.

There are many lessons that we as Americans can and should learn from Brexit, but there's also a lesson we should learn as Christians -- our vote matters, and we can be the deciding factor.

Imagine if that were the case here in America. The good news is that it can be.

**If we are successful at My Faith Votes, we will get the 25 million Christians who did not vote in 2012 out to the polls this November. But we can't do it without your support.**

**[Will you make a secure, tax-deductible donation of any amount right now?](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/36187280:sZ593WY-N:m:1:876315805:09C516FAB679C68390B648BA68F6BBF0:r)
**
It's clear from looking at the vote in Britain that Christians knew what they wanted, and they voted in big numbers. Now, the British people have an opportunity to reclaim their independence, their sovereignty, and most importantly, their values.

**[Peter, let's take a page from their playbook. Help us motivate our fellow believers and restore the nation we love. Please make a tax-deductible donation now.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/36187280:sZ593WY-N:m:1:876315805:09C516FAB679C68390B648BA68F6BBF0:r)**

Thank you for your time, and God Bless.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

name: Governor Nikki Haley
subject: Promises made and delivered
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Pence for Indiana
body:
Republicans know that real reforms don’t come from a top-down approach from Washington, D.C. They happen right here at home. Our frustration comes fr
---
| [](http://links.mikepence.com/u/afe627e6dba648bfa23e0a744c7697ee?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=image_header_logo&utm_term=fundraising_deadline&utm_campaign=eom&utm_content=20160627-promises-made-and-delivered-3611-direct) |
| Friend,

Republicans know that real reforms don’t come from a top-down approach from Washington, D.C. They happen right here at home, in our states.

Our frustration comes from a government that has grown day after day, year after year, yet doesn't serve us any better. The problem is that we hear the same, endless conversations over and over again, making promises and never keeping them.

That is why Republicans value the efforts and the leadership of our nation’s Governors – **and one example of a leader who has made promises and gone above and beyond in delivering on them is Governor Mike Pence.**

Mike’s vision is one that lifts up all Hoosiers and moves Indiana forward with commonsense, conservative principles – and he’s been able to do a lot in his first term.

Mike believes in the notion that encouraging American innovation and success instead of demonizing it can truly lift our economy and create lasting jobs.

**This November, my friend Mike is running for re-election.** I wanted to take this opportunity to reach out to you personally and ask for your help in delivering a victory for him on Election Day.

**Mike is up against a big deadline at the end of the month. Midnight tonight, their public report is due, [so I hope that you can contribute $20 or whatever you can to Team Pence](http://links.mikepence.com/u/50272c38b64c4675a17f629b7076e28c?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&amount=20&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=text_body_amount_1&utm_term=fundraising_deadline&utm_campaign=eom&utm_content=20160627-promises-made-and-delivered-3611-direct) so that they can finish this quarter strong and continue leaving a legacy that Indiana can be proud of.**

In 2016, we have big decisions to make. Our country and our leaders are being tested. But we've been tested in the past, and our people have always risen to the challenge.

[**Help support Mike by contributing $20 or whatever you can by MIDNIGHT tonight to his re-election campaign.**](http://links.mikepence.com/u/5ffab4c9f1f846e5b255f1a8a045eb24?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&amount=20&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=text_body_amount_2&utm_term=fundraising_deadline&utm_campaign=eom&utm_content=20160627-promises-made-and-delivered-3611-direct)

Thank you,
Nikki Haley
South Carolina Governor |

subject: over and over again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,

Greg Gianforte keeps proving over and over again that he just doesn't understand what public access to our lands and waters really means. During the first gubernatorial debate, he said **he has** the closest public fishing access to downtown Bozeman and **invited** Steve to come fish.

Here was Steve's mic-drop response: "Thanks for the invitation. But the beauty is, that's a public right of way. I don't need your permission."

| [](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=jqyydzmSRZ9LhPasbhE3sM3W2WO3fMha)

Montanans don't need an invitation to enjoy our public lands and streams -- it's our birthright, it's in our DNA.

**[Sign the petition to let Greg Gianforte know that you don't need his permission to hike, hunt and fish. And let us know your favorite place in MT where you #DontNeedPermission to go.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=nCJNuCkRaz4tsOsOjUaWMc3W2WO3fMha)**

Thanks,

Team Bullock

name: Russ Feingold
subject: I've had enough
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
It's time to put an end to the politics of divide and conquer. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf437f/1c469400/639e686/356c673/532388726/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-06-30_eoq9_rdf_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-30_eoq9_rdf_nd&utm_campaign=eoq9_rdf&utm_medium=ema") Friend -- Ron Johnson. Scott Walker. Donald Trump. Do you know what these guys have in common? They've all built their careers on the politics of divide and conquer. The people of Wisconsin are telling me they want our country to unite again. But folks like Senator Johnson aren't listening to the people because they can't get elected without keeping us divided. I've had enough. It's time to put an end to this cynical kind of politics. It's time to bring people together again. That's why I'm running for Senate, and that's why I need your help today. **[Will you contribute $5 today to help us reach our $250,000 goal by midnight tonight?](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf437f/1c469400/639e686/356c673/532388726/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-06-30_eoq9_rdf_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-30_eoq9_rdf_nd&utm_campaign=eoq9_rdf&utm_medium=ema")** [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf437f/1c469400/639e686/356c673/532388726/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-06-30_eoq9_rdf_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-30_eoq9_rdf_nd&utm_campaign=eoq9_rdf&utm_medium=ema") [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf437f/1c469400/639e686/356c673/532388726/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-06-30_eoq9_rdf_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-30_eoq9_rdf_nd&utm_campaign=eoq9_rdf&utm_medium=ema") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf437f/1c469400/639e686/356c670/532388726/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-06-30_eoq9_rdf_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-30_eoq9_rdf_nd&utm_campaign=eoq9_rdf&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")

I've put over 46,000 miles on the campaign van, traveling to all of Wisconsin's 72 counties multiple times. I listen to what people from all backgrounds have to say. Folks are telling me they want a government that works for them, not just billionaires and wealthy special interests. They want elected officials who will bring people together, not tear us apart.
Senator Ron Johnson got elected six years ago by dividing the people and hoping enough of them just don't vote. It worked for Governor Walker. It worked for Donald Trump. And with the help of over $10 million in funding from outside right-wing groups, Senator Johnson is hoping it will work for him again. We need your help to make sure real people -- like the hardworking people I meet on the campaign trail every day -- win, not the special interests and their divide-and-conquer campaign.
Our campaign's June 30 end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is tonight, and we still need to raise $30,213 to hit my grassroots fundraising goal. Will you join us by making a $5 contribution before the deadline?
**[Contribute $5 today to help us reach our $250,000 goal by midnight tonight.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf437f/1c469400/639e686/356c673/532388726/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-06-30_eoq9_rdf_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-30_eoq9_rdf_nd&utm_campaign=eoq9_rdf&utm_medium=ema")**
Wisconsin deserves better than the politics of divide and conquer. And with your help, I know we'll get there.
Sincerely,
Russ Feingold

body:
Hey friend,
My team just gave me an update, and it looks like we could fall behind before tonight's big FEC deadline.
The future of the Supreme Court and control of the Senate hinge on our race, so I'm coming directly to you. **[Please, give $3 or more now so that together, we can win in November and get the Senate working for Granite State families again.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd450/2a380d31/132199a9/fb9d2a/4258883918/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNjMwYW0tbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160630am-nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**

**[Please, make a donation to this campaign now, before the midnight deadline, so that we can win this election, secure the future of the Supreme Court, and make real progress for hard-working Americans.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd450/2a380d31/132199a9/fb9d2a/4258883918/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNjMwYW0tbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160630am-nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
Not much time left!
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: We're going to the convention
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
#
Tonight is an important fundraising deadline for our campaign, sisters and brothers, and I want to take a moment to tell you why.
In less than one month, we are going to take our political revolution into the halls of the Democratic National Convention in Philadelphia where we will fight to place a $15 minimum wage, opposition to the TPP, and a ban on fracking directly into the Democratic Party platform.
Our campaign has earned the right to send almost 1,900 delegates to vote on these important issues, but many of them are working folks and the costs of attending the convention are too high. So I want to help them get there, because this campaign isn't about Bernie Sanders, it's about all of us.
We have another FEC fundraising deadline tonight, the last one before the convention. And when we report our numbers, we can send a powerful message to the political establishment that we intend to get every last one of our delegates to Philadelphia to fight for the values we share.
[**Can I count on you to make a $2.70 contribution today? Your donation, along with thousands being made right now, will go directly towards ensuring we can get all of our delegates to Philadelphia for the convention next month.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/final_fec_deadline?refcode=em160630-v2 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/final_fec_deadline?refcode=em160630-v2")
Our power comes from a simple, timeless truth: that when people stand together, there is nothing we cannot accomplish. And I know that if we continue to fight to get all of our sisters and brothers to Philadelphia next month, we are going to transform the Democratic Party.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/final_fec_deadline?refcode=em160630-v2 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/final_fec_deadline?refcode=em160630-v2")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE

Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

I stand by my decisions. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=OTEzMzcwOQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTQyODc1NTE4S0&mt=1&rt=0)

body:

Friend,

Fundraising reports are out and he did it again. Greg Gianforte wrote himself another $100,000 check to prop up his campaign.

Steve's first debate performance was described as "confident," "assertive," and "accomplished." The latest financial reports show that Steve outraised Greg Gianforte yet again. The energy and enthusiasm are with Steve, and the Gianforte camp has to be feeling nervous.

But now Greg Gianforte has dumped in more than half a million dollars of his personal fortune into this race. There is no other way to say this -- he is spending an unheard-of amount of money. **[Will you help make sure we don't get drowned out by donating $15?](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=DS3B0z5UASZ%2F2XjzJqxyDu7fOL0ZI0tH)**

This is projected to be the most expensive governor's race in Montana history. Greg Gianforte is up on TV with a ton of money behind two new misleading ads. But here is what all of this big spending can't change -- Steve has proven over and over again that he understands what it takes to keep this state great and he'll keep delivering for Montanans.

**[Please kick in $15 to make sure we keep Steve in the governor's office.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=%2B3MnGF9fJXUd6LMBEP6pg%2B7fOL0ZI0tH)**

Friend --
“The Republican Governors Association will do everything we can to have Bill Bryant win for Governor.”

Those were Governor Susana Martinez’s words on Saturday to over 1,000 people in the audience at our “It’s Time for New Leadership” rally. If you’d like to help us bring new leadership to Washington, there are a few things I’d like to ask of you. First, please [view and share the link of my speech](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fvimeo.com%2F172658274%2Fbc1e7bd20c&e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=speech_video&n=2) below. We were over one thousand strong at the rally, so imagine if each and every one of you emailed it to your friends and family and shared it with your network on Facebook and Twitter. Be sure to let people know which parts resonate with you, and we can reach the people we need to turn out to the Primary by August 2nd. [https://vimeo.com/172658274/bc1e7bd20c

](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fvimeo.com%2F172658274%2Fbc1e7bd20c&e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=speech_video&n=3)Next, we have a major fundraising goal to meet before July 10th. The numbers show that the more people hear from Jay Inslee, the less they like him, but the opposite is true for us. Our message is resonating with people, and we want to put it on TV. Can you help us [by making a contribution](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fbill-bryant-for-governor&e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=speech_video&n=4)?

[Quick Donate $50](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fbill-bryant-for-governor%3Famount%3D50&e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=speech_video&n=5) \- [Quick Donate $100](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fbill-bryant-for-governor%3Famount%3D100&e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=speech_video&n=6) \- [Quick Donate $250](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fbill-bryant-for-governor%3Famount%3D250&e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=speech_video&n=7) Thank you for your support, for your faith in this campaign, and for your tireless activism in pursuit of a better Washington for everyone. The energy in that room on Saturday will carry each and every one of us to victory on Election Day. It’s Time. Bill Bryant

Paid for by Washingtonians for Bryant (R)

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you have any questions or comments, [click here](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/contact?e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=speech_video&n=8) and let us know. We believe that email is one of the best ways to stay in touch, but you can [click here if you would like to unsubscribe](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/unsubscribe?e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=speech_video&n=9) from these messages.

If you’re not interested in continuing to receive email updates, there are other ways to stay involved. You can follow our campaign on [Facebook](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fbillbryantwashington&e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=speech_video&n=10) or [Twitter](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2FBillBryantWA&e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=speech_video&n=11).

**Thank you so much for everything you’re doing to help make Washington State a better place to learn, to work, to play, and to live.**

Washingtonians for Bryant (R), P.O. Box 2121, Tacoma, WA 98401

[Privacy Policy](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/privacy_policy?e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=speech_video&n=12)

body:
| Peter -- With less than 12 hours left until our June 30 finance deadline, we really need your help.

I know you’ve received quite a few emails asking for your help this week from Rob, Jane, Governor Kasich and others on our campaign team, but our records show that you still haven’t sent a donation to help reach our end of the quarter fundraising goal of $20,000. I spoke with Rob and told him that I would reach out to you one more time today to see if you planned to donate. Peter, National Democrats are doing everything they can to stop Rob from being re-elected. So many people are counting on us to win this seat to keep the Republican Majority in the Senate. I know that Rob is counting on your help. Will you please consider sending a donation before midnight? Imagine the difference that you can make in this election. Please click the link below to donate. name: Nancy Feingold
subject: He's always stood up for the little guy
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
Can you help my brother reach his goal? | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf437b/1c469400/6248ba8/356c2f5/3307760854/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-06-30_eoq11_nf_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-30_eoq11_nf_nd&utm_campaign=eoq11_nf&utm_medium=ema") Friend -- Russ Feingold has never been afraid to stand up for what's right. Trust me: I am his older sister, I know! I remember having many heated debates about current events on family car rides. Russ, in the back seat, would listen first -- then say what was on his mind, cogently. From day one, he's always stood up for the little guy -- not the privileged few -- and that's just what he'll do as Wisconsin's next senator. **Things are heating up in Russ's campaign: The Koch brothers and right-wing special interest groups are pouring millions of dollars into ads for my brother's opponent, and our biggest end-of-quarter deadline is in just a few hours.** **[Can you help my brother Russ reach his goal with a contribution of $5 or more?](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf437b/1c469400/6248ba8/356c2f5/3307760854/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-06-30_eoq11_nf_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-30_eoq11_nf_nd&utm_campaign=eoq11_nf&utm_medium=ema")** [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf437b/1c469400/6248ba8/356c2f5/3307760854/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-06-30_eoq11_nf_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-30_eoq11_nf_nd&utm_campaign=eoq11_nf&utm_medium=ema") [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf437b/1c469400/6248ba8/356c2f5/3307760854/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-06-30_eoq11_nf_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-30_eoq11_nf_nd&utm_campaign=eoq11_nf&utm_medium=ema") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf437b/1c469400/6248ba8/356c2f2/3307760854/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-06-30_eoq11_nf_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-30_eoq11_nf_nd&utm_campaign=eoq11_nf&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")

Russ has been very enthusiastically visiting each of Wisconsin's 72 counties, running a positive campaign focused on listening to the issues that matter to the families of Wisconsin. If I ever start to get cynical about the race, Russ knows exactly how to turn my head around, by telling me an inspiring story from someone he met on the campaign trail that week.
My respect for him and what he's doing for all of us is heartfelt and unending. We need Russ to represent the hardworking families of Wisconsin and be a champion for our progressive values in the Senate.
**[Russ is so close to reaching his $250,000 goal, and we only have a few hours left. I know if we all pitched in together, even $5, we can cross the finish line by midnight.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf437b/1c469400/6248ba8/356c2f5/3307760854/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-06-30_eoq11_nf_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-30_eoq11_nf_nd&utm_campaign=eoq11_nf&utm_medium=ema")**
I couldn't be more proud to stand with you in support of my little brother, Russ.

Nancy Feingold

body:
#
Sisters, Brothers, and Friends,
The world is going to have answers to two very important questions about our campaign in about three weeks.
1. Are we able to bring all of our nearly 1,900 delegates to the Democratic convention in Philadelphia, where with Bernie they will cast important votes for a progressive platform that includes issues like opposition to a vote against the disastrous TPP, or a $15 federal minimum wage?

2. Will the FEC fundraising report we must file days before the convention show that we have the momentum and the power to continue the incredible work of our political revolution?

I want the answers to both of those questions to be yes. **The future of our movement depends on it. Can you help before the FEC deadline atmidnight?**
[**Make a $3 contribution to Bernie Sanders before tonight's FEC deadline and you will make sure all our delegates go to the convention and we'll show the continued strength of our political revolution.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/final_fec_deadline?refcode=em160630-pm-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/final_fec_deadline?refcode=em160630-pm-full")
When our delegates gather in Philadelphia, they'll have the chance to put the Democratic Party on the record about stopping votes against the TPP, fighting for a $15 federal minimum wage, opposing fracking, and so many more progressive priorities.
It's up to us to make it happen.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
